# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
#
# Recipe Bottle base compose file — static infrastructure
#
# Invoked via:
#   docker compose --env-file .rbk/rbrr.env --env-file .rbk/{moniker}/rbrn.env \
#     -f .rbk/rbob_compose.yml [-f .rbk/{moniker}/compose.yml] -p {moniker} up -d
#
# Env-file variables serve dual purpose:
#   1. YAML interpolation (${VAR} in this file — image refs, subnet, container names)
#   2. Container environment forwarding (bare names in environment: sections)
#
# Network topology:
#   sentry: default (internet via bridge) + enclave (eth0=default priority:1000, eth1=enclave priority:500)
#   pentacle: enclave only (static IP, routes through sentry)
#   bottle: shares pentacle network namespace (network_mode: service:pentacle)
#
# Health chain: sentry healthy → pentacle starts → pentacle healthy → bottle starts (sessile profile)

services:
  sentry:
    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}-image
    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-sentry
    privileged: true
    networks:
      default:
        priority: 1000
      enclave:
        ipv4_address: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}
        priority: 500
    ports:
      - "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}:${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}"
    environment:
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP
      - RBRR_DNS_SERVER
      - RBRN_ENTRY_MODE
      - RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION
      - RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE
      - RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE
      - RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
      - RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE
      - RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS
      - RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
      - RBJE_PROBE
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "test -f /tmp/rbjh_healthy"]
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15
      start_period: 5s

  pentacle:
    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}-image
    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-pentacle
    privileged: true
    networks:
      enclave:
        ipv4_address: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}
    environment:
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
    command: ["/opt/rbk/rbjp_pentacle.sh"]
    depends_on:
      sentry:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "test -f /tmp/rbjph_healthy"]
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15
      start_period: 5s

  bottle:
    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}-image
    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-bottle
    network_mode: "service:pentacle"
    security_opt:
      - label:disable
    cap_drop:
      - NET_RAW
    environment:
      - RBOB_HOST_UID
      - RBOB_HOST_GID
      - RBRV_USER
    depends_on:
      pentacle:
        condition: service_healthy
    profiles:
      - sessile

networks:
  enclave:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}

    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}-image

      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP
      - RBRR_DNS_SERVER
      - RBRN_ENTRY_MODE
      - RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION
      - RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE
      - RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE
      - RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
      - RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE
      - RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS
      - RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
      - RBJE_PROBE
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "test -f /tmp/rbjh_healthy"]
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15
      start_period: 5s

  pentacle:
    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}-image
    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-pentacle
    privileged: true
    networks:
      enclave:
        ipv4_address: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}
    environment:
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
    command: ["/opt/rbk/rbjp_pentacle.sh"]
    depends_on:
      sentry:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "test -f /tmp/rbjph_healthy"]
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15
      start_period: 5s

  bottle:
    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}-image
    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-bottle
    network_mode: "service:pentacle"
    security_opt:
      - label:disable
    cap_drop:
      - NET_RAW
    environment:
      - RBOB_HOST_UID
      - RBOB_HOST_GID
      - RBRV_USER
    depends_on:
      pentacle:
        condition: service_healthy
    profiles:
      - sessile

networks:
  enclave:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}

file.content:
test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"

  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"

  # Get OAuth token
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  buc_step "Logging into container registry"

  # Construct full image reference
  local z_full_ref="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_locator}"

  # Docker login to GAR
  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}" \
    || buc_die "Container runtime authentication failed"

  buc_step "Pulling image: ${z_full_ref}"

  # Pull image
  docker pull "${z_full_ref}" || buc_die "Image pull failed"

  # Get local image ID
  local z_image_id
  docker inspect --format='{{.Id}}' "${z_full_ref}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null \
    || buc_die "Failed to get image ID"
  z_image_id=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")

content.text:
## AAB Summary

### Changes landed

**Runtime prefix** (`RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX` → local container/network names):
- `rbob_bottle.sh:104-109` — ZRBOB_SENTRY/PENTACLE/BOTTLE/NETWORK now prefixed
- `rbob_bottle.sh:202` — compose `-p` project name prefixed (so network name derivation `{project}_enclave` stays consistent with ZRBOB_NETWORK)
- `.rbk/rbob_compose.yml` — all three `container_name:` directives prefixed

**Cloud prefix** (`RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX` → GAR path vessel position):
- `rbob_bottle.sh:126-131` — SENTRY/BOTTLE IMAGE/VOUCH refs
- `rbrn_cli.sh:55-56` — survey-time image refs
- `rbfr_FoundryRetriever.sh` — 7 path sites (4 API URLs + 3 image refs) + wrest locator
- `rbfv_FoundryVerify.sh` — 6 manifests URL sites, 1 tags/list URL, z_vi_gar_prefix construction (×2), zjq_vessel jq args (×3), zjq_vouches_package jq arg
- `rbfc_FoundryCore.sh` — reliquary tool-image prefix (line 111), `zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact` callers at 653/680/690
- `rbfd_FoundryDirectorBuild.sh` — 9 path sites (reliquary canary, enshrine HEAD check, enshrine_image_prefix, sigil path construction, context_tag, image_ref/vouch_ref, graft image_ref) + `zjq_moniker`/`zjq_vessel` jq args
- `rbfl_FoundryLedger.sh` — 5 HEAD checks + 5 DELETEs + tags/list + rekon tags/list + jettison manifests + inscribe reliquary jq arg
- `.rbk/rbob_compose.yml` — all three `image:` refs

**Enshrine category namespace**: added `_RBGE_ENSHRINE_NAME` substitution in rbfd's enshrine jq block; updated `rbgje01-enshrine-copy.sh:62` to consume it instead of the hardcoded `enshrine` literal. Parallel to how `_RBGN_RELIQUARY` carries the prefixed reliquary datestamp.

### Adjacent fix (in blast radius)

`rbfc_FoundryCore.sh:653` — fixed pre-existing typo `RBGC_vouches_PACKAGE` → `RBGC_VOUCHES_PACKAGE`. The hallmark-only plumb lookup had been silently broken by this misspelled variable name since it was introduced. (Discussed with you and you approved the one-char cleanup.)

### Pace slated for end of heat

**₢A_AAM — `oci-magic-string-extraction`** — captures the future OCI Distribution Spec protocol keyword extraction (`manifests`, `blobs`, `tags/list`, `v2`) as follow-up work. Scoped deliberately narrower than the `enshrine`/`hallmarks`/`reliquaries` category namespaces, which AAK owns as part of its categorical layout redesign.

### Verification

- **Fast suite: 90/90 green** (47 enrollment-validation + 21 regime-validation + 7 regime-smoke + 15 handbook-render)
- Nameplate render and nameplate-info survey both exercise RBRN's image-ref computation cleanly with empty prefix
- RBRR regime render surfaces both new vars with "(not set)" for empty default

### Out of AAB scope (confirmed)

- **GAR layout grammar reshape** — `₢A_AAK` restructures into `<prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/{image,vouch,...}` plus pluralization of `enshrine` → `enshrines` and the three-constant category family
- **Marshal-zero blank-template emission** — `₢A_AAC`
- Crucible suite not run (requires container runtime — run against Moriah or equivalent before final sign-off if you want the 117-case validation)

Ready to wrap ₢A_AAB? (Not auto-wrapping — you call it.)

params.intent: Thread RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX into local container/network names and RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX into GAR path construction at vessel position across the foundry family. Runtime side: rbob_bottle.sh kindle constants (ZRBOB_SENTRY/PENTACLE/BOTTLE/NETWORK) and compose -p project arg carry the prefix so compose's generated {project}_enclave network name matches ZRBOB_NETWORK; compose.yml container_name directives interpolate RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX. Cloud side: RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX inserted at GAR-internal vessel-path position across bash sites (rbob GAR image/vouch refs, rbrn survey image refs, rbfr wrest locator + 4 API URLs + 3 image refs, rbfv 9 manifests URLs + z_vi_gar_prefix x2, rbfc zrbfc_resolve_tool_images reliquary prefix + zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact callers, rbfd reliquary canary + enshrine HEAD + enshrine image prefix + sigil path + context tag + kludge/graft image refs, rbfl 5 HEAD + 5 DELETE + 2 tags/list + jettison manifest) and baked into jq-arg substitutions feeding Cloud Build step scripts (_RBGA_VESSEL via zjq_vessel/zjq_moniker, _RBGV_VESSEL, _RBGY_MONIKER, _RBGN_RELIQUARY, _RBGV_VOUCHES_PACKAGE). Compose.yml image refs prepend RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX at vessel segment. Enshrine category: new _RBGE_ENSHRINE_NAME substitution in rbfd's enshrine jq block carrying ${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}enshrine; rbgje01-enshrine-copy.sh consumes it to replace the bare 'enshrine' literal (parallel to how _RBGN_RELIQUARY carries the prefixed reliquary datestamp). All path threading is AAK-disposable — AAK reshapes path grammar entirely into <prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/... categorical layout, so AAB keeps the current vessel:hallmark-suffix shape and inserts prefix at vessel position only, zero structural change. Fixed adjacent pre-existing typo in rbfc_FoundryCore.sh:653: RBGC_vouches_PACKAGE -> RBGC_VOUCHES_PACKAGE (misspelled variable name in hallmark-only plumb lookup — silently fell through to 'Hallmark not found in vouches superdirectory' die branch under set -u, surfaced while threading the prefix through that line). Verification: fast suite 90/90 green (47 enrollment-validation + 21 regime-validation + 7 regime-smoke + 15 handbook-render); nameplate render and nameplate-info survey exercise RBRN image-ref computation cleanly with empty prefix; RBRR repo regime render surfaces both prefix vars with '(not set)' indicator. Crucible suite not run here (requires container runtime) — baseline-preservation property of empty-default makes regression risk low, but worth running against a live fundus before final sign-off.
